archetype_reasoning: This trader demonstrates extraordinary accuracy in exactly two domains — Russia_UKR (91.5% over 1,062 trades) and Trump_US (88.2% over 390 trades) — but catastrophically fails outside them, with only 6.5% accuracy across 491 'Other' trades. The extreme directionality (0.878) and concentration in just 5 distinct markets further confirm a deep specialist profile rather than a broad forecaster. The 'Other' domain performance is so inverted it suggests either systematic mispricing exploitation gone wrong or strong priors misapplied to unfamiliar territory.
domain_blindspots: Other: catastrophic 6.5% accuracy across 491 trades — essentially anti-predictive; recent Harris dropout losses reinforce this pattern
domain_summary: This trader has genuine, elite-level edge in Russia-Ukraine conflict markets and Trump/US political markets, likely built on deep domain knowledge and information networks. Outside these two areas, their signals should be treated as inverse indicators or ignored entirely.
signal_weight_reasoning: FULL weight applies only to Russia_UKR and Trump_US signals. The 'Other' domain accuracy of 6.5% — far below random chance — means non-domain signals are actively harmful to copy. The Harris dropout string of 15 consecutive losses at ~0.69-0.71 prices suggests overconfident position-building on wrong thesis outside their core expertise.
discounted_domains: any market outside Russia_UKR and Trump_US

Watch whether trader returns to 'Other' domain markets; if so, consider inverse signal

summary: One of the most domain-concentrated elite traders in the system, with a near-unmatched Russia_UKR track record (91.5% / 972 wins) and strong Trump_US performance (88.2% / 344 wins). However, outside these two domains the trader is actively destructive — a 6.5% accuracy rate across 491 'Other' trades is a severe red flag and represents the mirror image of their domain expertise. The recent 15-trade losing streak on Harris dropout markets at ~0.69-0.71 prices demonstrates both the risk of overconfidence bleed and sunk-cost scaling. Treat Russia_UKR and Trump_US signals as HIGH value; treat all other signals from this trader as noise or potential inverse indicators.
